nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 帕拉州
nodes.summary: 帕拉州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联57种鸟类，包括灰穴䳍、Red-throated piping guan、Buff-browed chachalaca等57种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Pelzeln's tody-tyrant
nodes.summary: Pelzeln's tody-tyrant（Pelzeln's tody-tyrant，学名 Hemitriccus inornatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Pelzeln's tody-tyrant (Hemitriccus inornatus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Brazil, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Pelzeln's tody-tyrant (Hemitriccus inornatus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Brazil, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Pelzeln's tody-tyrant (Hemitriccus inornatus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Brazil, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Downloaded from https://www.birds.cornell.edu/clementschecklist/download/ retrieved October 23, 2024 BirdLife International adds Suriname. The map in van Perlo's Field Guide to the Birds of Brazil shows the species on the Brazil/Venezuela border and the author does not state that the species is endemic to Brazil; Hilty's Birds of Venezuela states that it may occur in the southern part of the country. The Cornell Lab of Ornithology's Birds of the World places it in Brazil and "probably also in adjacent Venezuela and Colombia". The South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society has documented records in all three of Brazil, Suriname, and Venezuela. All of the sources that provide detail agree that it is present in scattered sites along the Negro River and its tributaries, and Cornell and BirdLife International add sites in Brazil's Roraima and Pará states. Pelzeln's tody-tyrant inhabits woodlands on campinarana white-sand soils
